_fields.brief: path to brief or inline summary
_fields.criteria_met: integer count of Ideal State Criteria satisfied
_fields.rating: integer 1-10, overall outcome (10 = ideal, 1 = total miss)
_fields.mode: optional: full or lightweight workflow variant
_fields.failure_ref: path under failures/ if a failure was captured, optional

_format: one JSON object per line, append-only; do not wrap entries in a JSON array. The entries below are illustrative examples — replace them with your own runs.

notes: Example entry. Added a CSV export endpoint; all 6 binary criteria met (schema, pagination, unit tests, lint, docs, error path). Deterministic checks first (pytest + ruff green), then behavioral (exported 10k rows under the size cap).

brief: inline: redirect loop on expired session
notes: Example entry. One-line fix (clear the stale cookie before redirect) plus a regression test. Lightweight variant: single-file, easily reversible.

Example of an HONEST low rating. 2 of 7 criteria slipped: env-var override precedence has no test, and the migration guide is still a stub. Shipped the core conversion; parked the two gaps as follow-ups rather than claiming done. A real 6 is more useful than a generous 8.
Example entry. MIME sniff + size cap + path-traversal guard. Anti-loop triggered once (a regex approach failed twice; switched to a library validator on the third). Dead end captured under failures/.
